summary: Add OpenClaw/Polaris edit marker to footer
details: Small HTML comment in index.html footer to verify end-to-end editing and deployment from Raspberry Pi via OpenClaw.

summary: Create Polaris public and private dashboards
details: Added public Polaris activity dashboard at polaris.html and initial private dashboard shell at /private/index.html for Cloudflare Access gating.

summary: Redesign public Polaris dashboard with grouped, collapsible log
details: Updated polaris.html to add overview cards, per-day collapsible panels, and light animations, plus dedicated CSS in assets/css/polaris.css.

summary: Add Polaris TODO section to private dashboard
details: Extended /private/index.html with a visible Polaris TODO list summarizing pending work like wiring live Pi status, finishing Cloudflare Access, and future dashboard ideas.

summary: Add README documenting portfolio + Polaris architecture
details: Created README.md explaining that this repo backs devrobotics.dev, is managed by an OpenClaw agent (Polaris) on a Raspberry Pi, and includes a high-level system design + process flow for changes.

summary: Add disclaimer noting README is maintained by Polaris
details: Appended a disclaimer to README.md with a warning icon explaining that the README was drafted and is maintained by the Polaris agent running on the Raspberry Pi via OpenClaw.

summary: Fix clipping on long Polaris log entries
details: Increased the max-height on open day panels in assets/css/polaris.css so long descriptions are no longer visually cut off at the bottom of the card.

summary: Add sidebar link from portfolio to Polaris dashboard
details: Updated index.html sidebar navigation to include a direct link to /polaris.html so it feels like a first-class part of the site.

summary: Add scrollable bodies to daily Polaris log panels
details: Changed the open state of polaris-day-body to use a fixed max-height with overflow-y:auto so long day logs can be scrolled inside the card instead of being visually clipped.

summary: Revert main sidebar to original layout
details: Restored index.html sidebar navigation to the original five-section layout (Introduction, Current Research, Featured Projects, At a Glance, Contact) and removed the Polaris Dashboard link to keep the portfolio section visually unchanged.
